rationale: Foreign nonprofit's legal name in its home jurisdiction; same key family as CORP_MBCA-12B (corporate counterpart), MBCA-12, MLLC-12, FICT-4 (foreign-entity-name convention per entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction.md).

label_verbatim: FIRST: The jurisdiction of its incorporation is ___
rationale: Home state or country. Same key as CORP_MBCA-12B.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The date on which it was authorized to carry on activities in the State of Maine is ___
rationale: Date the foreign nonprofit received Maine authority via the original NP_MNPCA-12 application. Same key as CORP_MBCA-12B (Maine-specific qualification anniversary, distinct from formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The post-office address to which the Secretary of State shall mail a copy of any process served upon him against the corporation is ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single full-width line for the post-surrender mailing address used for service of process on the Secretary of State. Re-uses the existing withdrawal.service_of_process_mailing_address key from CORP_MBCA-12B (the corporate counterpart) — the surrender filing serves the same statutory purpose under 13-B MRSA §1208 as withdrawal under 13-C §1521. Drafter originally proposed entity.post_surrender_service_address (novel) — corrected to the established withdrawal.* primitive.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the principal or registered office of the corporation, wherever located, is ___ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Single full-width physical address of the principal/registered office (may be outside Maine). Same key as MBCA-12 SIXTH and MLLC-12. Note: NP_MNPCA-12B has only the physical line — no separate optional mailing-address widget like MBCA-12's Text9, so entity.principal_office.mailing_address does not apply here.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized individual) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget, Shape D (matches CORP_MBCA-12B, MBCA-11, MLLC-12). The (signature) line above is wet-ink only with no widget.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up

rationale: Total fees ($15 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email (unusual on a surrender — the entity is exiting Maine — but the cover-letter widget is present).
